title: ferray-ufunc: no nan-aware reductions (nansum, nanmean, nanmin, nanmax, nanstd, nanvar, nanprod)
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy provides np.nansum, np.nanmean, np.nanmin, np.nanmax, np.nanstd, np.nanvar, np.nanprod — reductions that treat NaN as missing and skip it. ferray-ufunc has nancumsum and nancumprod (cumulative variants) but no nan-aware reductions. These are critical for real-world data which commonly contains NaN. They should be implemented as reduce operations with a NaN-skipping accumulator.
